functions.name: cp_core.utils.convert_to_bytes
documentation:
Will convert into bytes and optionally resize an image that is a file or a base64 bytes object.
Turns into PNG format in the process so that can be displayed by tkinter
\:param file_or_bytes: either a string filename or a bytes base64 image object
\:type file_or_bytes: (Union[str, bytes])
\:param resize: optional new size
\:type resize: (Tuple[int, int] or None)
\:return: (bytes) a byte-string object
\:rtype: (bytes)

functions.name: cp_core.libs.core.filter.parse.statistic.get_night_value
documentation:
获取夜间数据的平均值

主要功能：
1. 提取凌晨2点到3点30分之间的数据
2. 确保数据的时间连续性
3. 处理跨天的情况
4. 计算该时段数据的平均值

Parameters:
    origin_data: 包含时间和计划值的DataFrame
Returns:
    float: 夜间数据的平均值

is positive relative to the minimum protection potential criterion.

AC interference evaluation: acie

composite index
